Word has reached the Pathfinder Society of this strange phenomenon, and they have resolved to investigate and resolve the issue, as the Society has also had cause to use Silvertree when transporting relics between Hongal and Minkai.
---

Age rating: Teen (13+)

This Pathfinder session is hosted by the Pathfinder Society Emerald City Lodge. To sign up for this game, see the RPG signup desk in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

events.title: Jordan and Kelsey Cruz Q&A
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor]

events.title: The 8th Anime Jeopardy
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Welcome to our 8th year of Anime Jeopardy at Sakuracon! Know a lot about anime? Wanna test your knowledge against other players? Come and join us for a great time and some great prizes. Audience participation is offered as well if you want to sit in your seat and not have to go up to the front.

events.title: MARRIAGE TOXIN Panel – Battle for Marriage!
events.panelDescription:
[Guest of Honor] Join us and special guest Haruki Ishiya (voice of Hikaru Gero) from the
brand-new anime MARRIAGETOXIN. Learn all about the new series, Ishiya-san’s experience
and get a closer look at “the world’s toughest mission for love” you won’t want to miss!

events.title: Free Build Session
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] There will be a limited number of FREE kits available at each Free Build Session. These kits are first come, first serve. We highly recommend queuing in advance of each session. Registration will be required at the door for you to enter and work on your kit at one of our stations. Tools and assistance will be available along with both beginner and more advanced kits. You are also welcome to bring a kit of your own to any build session and use our tools or get assistance from one of our room staff members. All free build stations will need to be cleared at the end of the session to prepare for the next session.

events.title: Husky Wushu
events.panelDescription: [Cultural Panel] Wushu is a Chinese martial art and international sport derived from hundreds of years of traditional Chinese Kung Fu. Husky Wushu has been an active club at UW since 2009, with a mission to foster an inclusive community around the practice of Chinese martial arts. We will be performing a medley of individual forms, group forms and fight sets, including hand forms and weapon forms such as sword, staff, and fan. We'll be doing a workshop after our performance, so stick around to learn some skills from us!

events.title: Welcome to the WondaShow!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Hello and Welcome to the Wondashow! Join wonderland x showtime for a panel filled with games and trivia with a chance to win a prize or two!! Remember always — WONDAHOY! (๑>◡<๑)

events.title: Heroes of Watching Heroes of Cosplay
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] As unironic fans of Heroes of Cosplay, we know a little too much about the various circumstances surrounding this 2013 Syfy reality show which follows a group of cosplayers as they compete in contests. That doesn't mean we don't love making jabs at it either. Join us as we watch two of our favorite episodes as we playfully tease, info dump and laugh our way through this amazing piece of cosplay history.

events.title: Learn Wotagei with Sakuraka
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Wotagei is a Japanese light stick dance famously seen in Oshi no Ko. Sakuraka, Seattle's own wotagei team, will showcase the art form and also teach you a basic skill so you too can dance to your favorite J-music!

events.title: Dungeons and Decisions; 100 Players, 1 Character
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Gather round as we tell the tale of Ehverie Bahdy, a feeble knight who goes on a great quest. Join us on a choose-your-own-adventure game of Dungeons and Dragons where everyone in the audience plays a part in the decisions made by our single character!

events.title: Is a Sandwich Enough?' The Cruel Humor of Needs in Chainsaw Man
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] A satirical but serious look at everyone's favorite devil hunters from Chainsaw Man, and how our societal structures prevent them from fulfilling basic and emotional needs. WARNING: Spoilers for the Public Safety saga!

events.title: Your Waifu/Husbando Is Trash
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] It's back- everyone's favorite gameshow where you rave about your husbando or waifu while the audience judges! Show up for laughs, prizes, and memories that will keep you coming back for years to come.

events.title: Mecha History and Cultural Impact: Now on Blu-Ray!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] From the beginning of modern anime, there have been robots. But where did the word "robot" come from? When did they become giant, and where did the word Mecha come from? Just how giant can they get, and how powerful? What should I watch if I'm curious, but totally unfamiliar? What is Tokusatsu, and how does it relate to Power Rangers? If you've ever had any of these questions, this is a good place to get them answered! The history goes back farther than you would believe, and the impact on culture spreads farther than you would expect!

events.title: Outlining with Lyrics
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Rider4Z gives her tips and tricks on how to use lyrics to one's full advantage when building AMVs.

events.title: Hair, Hue, and Heroism: Blackness in Anime Aesthetics
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Skin tone, hair, style, culture... sometimes anime gets it, sometimes… not so much. “Hair, Hue, and Heroism” is a high-energy exploration of Black representation in anime and fandom. AC Mateen will break down why “accuracy policing” often excludes us, and how Black fans use cosplay, fanart, and community remixing to claim visibility, joy, and power. Expect laughs, insights, and a celebration of the ways Black fandom is leveling up the aesthetics game.

events.title: Call of Cthulhu: The Son of Nyx (Nyukusu No Musuko)
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] "The year is 2098 and you are crew on the spaceship Sakigake conducting a mineral survey on the surface of Pluto. But when you begin your journey back to earth, disaster strikes. A red-black swirling celestial body crashes into Pluto causing untold destruction. The last thing you see before losing consciousness are the eyes of an unspeakable cosmic horror rising from the chaos. Can you escape your doom and return to earth? Find out in this scenario straight from Japan from their number one TTRPG Call of Cthulhu! New players welcome, pregens provided.
---
Game Host: AJ
Session duration: 2 hours
Age rating: 18+

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

events.title: Fabula Ultima TTJRPG: PRESS START Tutorial: A Fated Descent
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] "The award-winning Fabula Ultima is designed to recreate the wondrous worlds, characters and stories seen in videogames such as the legendary Final Fantasy series. In this BEGINNER FRIENDLY introductory adventure, set out on an airship to investigate a massive magic crater, the site of a mysterious, city razing arcane disaster.
---
Game Host: Andrew Harshman
Session duration: 2 hours
Age rating: Teen (13+)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

events.title: Kristen McGuire AMA
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor]

events.title: Hyperfixation Hour, What's Yours?
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Do you have a hyperfixation that you wish you someone else knew about? Well, now is your chance to make it known. Take 2 minutes to explain your hyperfixation to our panel and the audience to try and convince them that it is something worthy of their time and research. Our panel will rate how enthralling and interesting your hyperfixation comes across. Prizes will be available for those that captivate the judges and crowd the most.

events.title: Samurai Undressed
events.panelDescription: [Cultural Panel] Get up close and personal with the samurai!  Discover what lies beneath the armor figuratively and literally! See how the individual components of Japanese armor were worn and what types of accessories and weapons a samurai may have carried into battle. Learn about interesting places to visit in Japan if you’re a fan of these ancient warriors!

events.title: Anime Dumpster Diving: How to Find Your Next Hidden Gem
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] There's usually a handful of anime every year that almost everyone knows about, but what about the rest? Which ones are worth watching, and how do you find them? Come learn how to "dumpster dive" for anime; find the shows that nobody knows about, and make an informed decision whether or not they will be for you. Not every show in the dumpster will be worth your time, but there's almost definitely some "hidden gems" lying in there just waiting to be discovered.

events.title: Yaoi Trivia
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Yaoi. You hear it, you see it, you consume it religiously. However, do you think you could present your knowledge when faced with the pressure of an entire audience? We have prepared for your viewing pleasure a trivia game and a popular ship tournament. Come win some prizes and argue for your favorite ship to make it to the top or stay to watch the chaos ensue.

events.title: Cairn 2E: The Sinister Secret of Saltmarsh Part 2
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] "Desolate and abandoned, the evil alchemist's mansion stands alone on the cliff, looking out towards the sea. Mysterious lights and ghostly hauntings have kept away the people of Saltmarsh, despite rumors of a fabulous treasure. What is its sinister secret?
---
Game Host: Xander
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: Teen (13+)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

events.title: Invincible (Free League): Metro Mayhem!
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] "Omni-Man has just left Earth (never to return?), and the Guardians of the Globe have their hands full dealing with all the villains who think there’s no one who can stop them. That means it’s up to you to investigate when Cecil hears word that the gangster Machine Head has recruited the Mauler Twins to clone … something. Find out what the Maulers are up to, foil Machine Head’s plan, whatever it may be, and try to make it back home in one piece. The world can’t afford to lose any more heroes.

In this adventure from the upcoming Invincible RPG Starter Set, take on the role of a young hero straight from the pages of the Invincible comics and show, struggling to make a difference and survive long enough to see the fruits or your labor. No experience with the Year Zero game system or familiarity with the world of Invincible is needed.
---
Game Host: Ryan
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: Teen (13+)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

events.title: Mahjong Strategy: Review Session
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] One of the best ways to get better is to see what other players do. In this review session we go through mahjong game logs and analyze the discards on a play-by-play basis, covering topics of strategy in the process.

events.title: Open Mic
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents]

events.title: Prize Room Open
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents]

events.title: A Practical Guide to Panel Profanity
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Are you a fan of running SC-MA content? Are you finding your vocabulary getting stale, leading attendees sighing at repeated word use? This is the panel for you! Ran by veterans of MA content we will guide you through the best ways to spice up your dialogue while avoiding any pitfalls.

events.title: Grand Archive – Free Starter Deck Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Step into the arena with FREE ready-to-play Silver Age preconstructed decks, officially sponsored by LSS. Experience the thrill of strategic 1v1 combat while making new friends in a fun and welcoming tournament setting! This event is a great chance to learn your first hero or try out a new class.All participants also receive a ticket for the grand giveaway on Sunday!Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: Grand Archive – Free Starter Deck Tournament
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] You’ve learned how to start the fight, Champion – now let’s find out if you can finish it. Take up your provided starter deck, and go toe-to-toe with your peers in a test of skill alone. But remember: even in defeat, there is victory… in the form of a ticket to the Grand Giveaway.

Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

All material graciously provided by Grand Archive’s developer Weebs of the Shore. Thank you for your continued support, WotS!

events.title: Grand Archive – Free Starter Deck Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] If you've heard of any single TCG it's probably Magic: The Gathering. If you've never dabbled in TCGs, or have just somehow never learned to play MTG, we have skilled volunteers who will make it their mission to ensure that you learn to start slinging spells and forgetting to untap your mana for the seventh time this game. If you want to learn the grand-daddy of them all, come over to TCGs and we'll get you started! All participants will receive a ticket to the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

events.title: Magic: The Gathering - Free Dragonstorm Tarkir Draft
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Come and enjoy a completely free Draft experience at Sakura-Con!All drafts are three rounds of best-of-one games. All participants will receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway, as well as one pack per win!Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Free Sealed Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: Idol Showdown Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Your favorite VTubers duke it out in this indie fighting game phenomenon. Represent your oshi and settle the ultimate question: who's best girl? Win prizes!

events.title: Super Smash Bros. Ultimate Tournament 2
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Round 2 of Smash mayhem! Different bracket, same high-stakes platform fighting. Show off those edge guards. Win prizes!

events.title: An Ethical Analysis of My Hero Academia
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] It's been 12 years, 4 movies, and 3 distinct epilogues since My Hero Academia was originally published. But what did it all MEAN? Together, we will approach the series earnestly and seriously as a work of literature and perform a holistic and comprehensive reading of the manga, spin-offs, and all supplementary texts. This will allow us to answer: Does the My Hero Academia franchise endorse a specific Normative Ethical Theory? (Expect full spoilers for all related media.)

events.title: Yabai!! (やばい) Takes
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Do you have burning opinions on a top-rated anime? Is there an anime that you believe is undeniably slept on... or one that's absolute trash? We want to hear all about it! This is your opportunity to take the stage and let the world* know your yabai takes.

events.title: AMA: The unfilteted truth about being a disabled Cosplayer
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] A full on ask me anything as a disabled cosplayer. Full honestly, no shame, unfiltered answers about the things you’re too scared to ask normally.

events.title: Name that Daddy
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] From the makers of “Ranking Anime’s Ultimate FBoys: Who's the King of the Island?” “Brace yourselves for the ultimate “Name That Daddy” quiz show. Contestants must identify mystery dads using cursed screenshots, clues, and hints like “gives off major ‘I left for milk’ energy” or “could solo the multiverse but can’t attend a parent-teacher conference.” Expect panic-buzzing, unhelpful hints, plot twists no custody court could handle, and at least one Daddy that makes you scream “That’s not a Dad, that’s a Zaddy”

events.title: Top 20 Comedy AMVs Countdown
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] As if just showing comedy AMVs was not enough! No, we had to go and turn it into a countdown of some of the best ones! Come and find what is number 1.

events.title: Beginner's Gunpla with Chris Hackney
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor] One of Chris’ favorite pastimes is to sit back with some relaxing music and build a giant robot suit that can destroy a small army. But when he can't do that, he settles for a 1/100th scale model instead. Let's talk about the basics of Gunpla, your favorite Gundam series, and maybe even win a prize!

events.title: Women in Video Games
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor] Come see some of your favorite voice actors discuss the ins-and-outs of voice acting for some of your favorite video games!

events.title: Tales from the Sea: Spooky Stories
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Hold your breath as you dive into this interactive storytelling panel that explores nautical stories from Japan, including scary monsters that dwell in the ocean. You know Ariel, but do you know Ningyo? Don't stay on the beach, cause what do they got, a lot of sand? We got tales that are grand!

events.title: Digimon Card Game - Free Starter Deck Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: Level Up with AMV Editors
events.panelDescription:
[Fan Panel] Presented by Winterblade AMVs, ResyAMV, and TheDestineeAMV

This is a live AMV editing boot camp like no other! Join a panel of three editors as they review new AMVs and share tips and tricks on what makes a great edit.

events.title: Can Fandom Be Toxic?
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Fandom can mean something different for everyone. Some find friends and family. Others find heated fan wars and a plethora of trolls. What does Fandom mean to you? Let's debate on whether Fandom are toxic or genuinely good.

events.title: Nu:Carnival: Yokai Slumber Party
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Eiden has invited Yakumo and Garu to join him in a fun-filled slumber party. How wholesome; and maybe a little thrilling! Come join us for the most comfy, cozy, crazy night of fun where you can play Nu:Carnival themed “gaymes”!

events.title: BrightNRose K-Pop RDP
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] We want to see you Eat it up! Eat it! Eat it UP! Come have fun and show off your moves at our K-Pop Random Play Dance Panel. We will play some classic and new K-pop AND J-pop tracks. Spectators are welcome! You can just come, sit, and watch the fun.

events.title: Snowball Earth – Episodes 1 & 2 Special Screening
events.panelDescription:
[Industry Panel] The earth has frozen over—and a new story of survival begins.
Join us for a special screening of Episode 1 and the Global Premiere of Episode 2 of the TV anime Snowball Earth!

Based on the manga by Yuhiro Tsujitsugu, Snowball Earth depicts a breathtaking, ice-covered future Earth brought to life through stunning animation and a powerful narrative. This special panel offers fans the rare opportunity to experience the very beginning of the series ahead of its global streaming.

Don’t miss this exclusive chance to witness the birth of Snowball Earth and receive a giveaway!

events.title: Beyond Anime High School: Anime For Grown-Ups
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Getting a little old for high school anime? Looking for something different? Let's look at some anime made for an older audience, about adult characters dealing with adult problems. About characters with jobs and responsibilities. Because there's more to life than teenage angst.

events.title: Free Build Session
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] There will be a limited number of FREE kits available at each Free Build Session. These kits are first come, first serve. We highly recommend queuing in advance of each session. Registration will be required at the door for you to enter and work on your kit at one of our stations. Tools and assistance will be available along with both beginner and more advanced kits. You are also welcome to bring a kit of your own to any build session and use our tools or get assistance from one of our room staff members. All free build stations will need to be cleared at the end of the session to prepare for the next session.

events.title: The Floral Court Invitational: A Sakura-Con Nerd Prom
events.panelDescription:
[Sakura-Con Presents] Prepare for an evening where elegance blossoms and fandom flourishes! Sakura-Con proudly presents the Floral Court Invitational, an exclusive Nerd Prom event designed for those who dance to the beat of their own heart.

Step into a night of sophisticated celebration, where the vibrant spirit of anime and manga meets the timeless grace of a formal ball. Adorn your finest attire—whether it’s a stunning gown, a sharp suit, or the impeccably formal wear of your favorite character. This is your chance to shine, mingle with fellow enthusiasts, and create unforgettable memories under a canopy of cherry blossoms.

Be Crowned a Sakura Flower Messenger! The highlight of the evening is our prestigious Sakura Flower Messenger Contest. Aspiring envoys of elegance will showcase their unique style, grace, and passion for the Sakura-Con spirit. Judges will be seeking individuals who embody charm, poise, and a profound appreciation for our community. The chosen Flower Messengers will hold a place of honor, representing the beauty and camaraderie of Sakura-Con.

Indulge in an enchanting atmosphere, enjoy delightful music, and take to the dance floor as we celebrate our shared love for all things anime, manga, and Japanese culture. Join us for the Floral Court Invitational – where every dance is a story, and every attendee is part of a grand tradition!

events.title: Social Deception: Open-Play
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Social Deception invites you to come play games from our collection! Self-guided, or run w/ staff help!

events.title: BOTC: Continuous Games
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Blood on the Clocktower: A social deduction game for 5-15 players! As many games as we can fit in the timeblock! Sign up for the next game, or join in midway as a traveler!

events.title: Waluigi Time!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Waluigi doesn't have his own game, but he has his own panel where he pays other people to talk about games he should have been in and how great he is.

events.title: Cosplay Lip Sync Workshop
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Are you new to cosplay lip sync or a seasoned performer? Then this workshop is for you! Come join in as we explore ways to sharpen our performance skills, provide tips on learning lyrics, and engage in fun activities to improve our choreography and character skills. All levels of performers are welcomed.

events.title: Cardfight Vanguard!! - Free Starter Deck Showdown!
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Ready for something a little bit more advanced? Did you just learn to play Cardfight Vanguard or are you a seasoned pro who just happened to see this event in your schedule app? (I see you). Either way, come on down and we'll furnish you with one of our starter decks, you'll play against some other Cardfighters and no matter what, you will get some cool prizes! Also for this year: You'll get to keep your deck! That's right; A free deck AND extra prizes! Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time. 8 Seat Event.

events.title: One Piece TCG - Learn to Play
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] This one's new! Echoes of Astra is a brand-new TCG from Parhelion Studios, an anime art themed game that mixes traditional TCG Gameplay with the tactical depth of war gaming! All wrapped in the package of some beautiful cardboard. If you want to learn a brand new TCG that is just starting this is your chance to get in on the ground floor! All participants will receive a ticket for the grand giveaway on Sunday!

All our materials for Echoes of Astra were graciously donated by Parhelion Studios, so a big thank you to them for allowing us to show their game to you. Come over to the TCG Room and one of our experienced volunteers will teach you all about this tactically rich, exciting new game!

events.title: One Piece TCG - Learn to Play
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Come learn the Netrunner TCG directly from the team developing it! Null Signal Games has sent us their very best to teach you how to be the best Runner you can be! All participants will receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

events.title: One Piece TCG - Learn to Play
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Obtain Fame, Wealth, and Power beyond your wildest dreams by coming to the TCG Room and learning to play the One Piece TCG! Will you be able to find the buried treasure- Or perhaps the treasure is actually the friendships you formed in your journey? No matter what, if you complete a learn to play session you will receive a ticket for our Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

events.title: One Piece TCG - Learn to Play
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Oh, it’s all very fine and well to take your carefully-curated team to victory – but someone who’s true Champion material has that special something that lets them bond with a team they’ve only just met, intuitively understand their strengths and weaknesses, and lead them to glory.

How do you develop a talent like that, you ask?

Why, many rounds of Build & Battle, of course! Assemble your deck from the contents of the provided Build & Battle Box, and battle your way to to the top of the mountain… or at least to a good time. All participants will also receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway!

Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: FGC Trivia 1
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Think you know fighting games? Prove it! Bar trivia style with rounds on characters, stages, music, and deep lore. Your parents said gaming wouldn't be useful—time to prove them wrong! Win prizes!

events.title: FGC Trivia 1
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Round 1 of Gundam Animayhem! Mobile suits clash in this classic PS1 fighter! Pick your favorite Gundam and show everyone why your timeline is superior. Win prizes!

events.title: Purchasing Fabrics Online: Tips and Tricks to Get The Fabric You Want!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Joann's is no longer with us, meaning that often times youll be turning to online shopping for all you fabric needs. Come learn how to make sure your getting the right fabric the first time! Learn about different fibers, weaves and weights and how they are marketed and tagged by online retailers. We will also discuss dye batches, price comparisons and the slight differences in fabric types that make all the difference in making your cosplay.

events.title: Your Babygirl is Mid 2: We Got a Bigger Room This Time
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] You’ve heard of “Your Waifu is Trash”, now get ready for “Your Babygirl is Mid”. You may have seen the term floating around fandom and found yourself asking: what does "babygirl" mean? Why are most of the characters I see being referred to as babygirl middle aged men? Why are they so sad? Well worry not--our panel of experts are here to provide the definitive guide on what makes a character a babygirl, as well as outline common misconceptions around its use. With such guiding traits as “old”, “has issues”, and “wanting to see them in a maid dress”, by the end of this panel you’re sure to have the tools you need to find the babygirl that’s right for you. For those who made it in last year: this presentation will have the same bones as 2025, but be updated with some fun new surprises!

events.title: Beyond the Arcane
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Are you an Arcane fan and want to dive deeper into Runeterra, the world of League of Legends? Or are you a long time League Fnatic (got ya) and want to explore what Arcane may have to offer in terms of lore? Come join us with an Analysis of Arcane through the eyes of League of Legends! Get to know the champions, current & previous lore, and many references thru this journey with us! I'm waiting for you summoner~

events.title: Danmei on the Rocks
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Come learn about the geologic processes that form the setting of your favorite danmei novels! Yes literally, it's all about the rocks! Or just come for the badge ribbon at the end if you like!

events.title: Flashy Cringy Cars: History of Itasha
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] You see a flashy car drive by covered in … anime characters? Come learn about this wild subculture of the fandom !

events.title: Maid: The Roleplaying Game: Meido Honor: Mistress Needs Wedding Badly!
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] "Love is up in the air, as the mistress is down a suitor and needs to marry next week to keep her mansion. For the sake of your honor as a maid...ahem, for true love's sake...can you save the occasion, and your job?

Ah, weddings, the happiest day of a blushing bride's life! At least, that's how your mistress's parents see it. They've been pushing her to settle down and marry a proper suitor, or else lose ownership of her mansion. And now, her suitor's gone...and worse, your employment is in danger!

So, one way or another, it's up to you to make sure the wedding bells ring for mistress. Will you track down the missing suitor? Set her up with a blind date? Forge nuptial papers? Dress up a life-size mannequin to walk the aisle with her? Help her parents find a change of heart? Or even...make her fall in love with one of her maids?
---
Game Host: Saoirse
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: 18+ (vulgar humor, sexual references, slapstick violence)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

events.title: Melodies of life (Final Fantasy Music Trivia)
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Few gaming franchises have shaped the soundscape of the industry quite like Final Fantasy. From the joyful rhythm of a Chocobo ride to the triumphant swell of the Victory Fanfare, the series’ iconic themes have become an emotional soundtrack for generations of fans. Crafted by legendary composers such as Nobuo Uematsu, Yoko Shimomura, and many more, these pieces are woven into the very identity of the franchise—its true Melodies of Life. In this interactive panel, attendees will put their musical memory to the test. Join us as contestants listen, guess, and compete to see whether the timeless music of Final Fantasy still resonates in the hearts of its most devoted fans. Whether you’re a seasoned Warrior of Light or a newcomer drawn by nostalgia, come celebrate the magic, history, and harmony of one of gaming’s greatest legacies.

events.title: Whose Line is it Anyway?
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] An improv comedy show where the games of Whose Line is it Anyway are performed by you. Come join in for classic games like Unlikely Superheroes, Scenes from a Hat, Party Quirks, and more. Come join us for all the laughs and fun.

events.title: The Panel Hikaru Died
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Yoshiki thinks he and Hikaru need to do some trust-building to fully accept each other (definitely not because Hikaru’s body got taken over by a super dangerous spirit). Join two boys learning to have fun again with ridiculous improv games and interactive activities where you can decide what happens! Hikaru needs practice being human, Yoshiki needs help coping, and you like a good laugh. What could go wrong? Hosted by Uptown Cosplay and Simply Roo.

events.title: Yuri Faves From a Fujo
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Have you only ever read BL, but are now interested in reading GL too and don't know where to start? Or do you just like yuri and want some to hear some recommendations that range from fluffy to toxic? This is the panel for you!

events.title: Koi Koi Contest - Seating
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Seating for the Koi Koi Contest

events.title: Animemes: Anime Memes and You!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] With the internet and social media like Tiktok, IG, and X enabling more and more anime fans to share their love for anime every day, it becomes increasingly important to understand the memes powering the expansion of otaku culture. Join us as we talk anime, memes, and how they relate to you!

events.title: Koi Koi - AMV Contest
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] There are so many fierce entries in the AMV contest that it breaks our hearts to have to narrow it down at all. Come let us know which video deserves justice by voting for your favorite of the non-finalists!

events.title: Starfinder Society: Take the Bait [SFS2 1-12]
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] "A Starfinder Society Scenario designed for 3rd- through 4th-level characters, playable in 2-3 hours.
The Starfinder Society has suffered in their quest to explore the mysterious Wreck of the Returned—they’ve lost good agents to the Wreck’s defenses and clashed with a rising foe called the Functionary, who claims to serve a being at the heart of the Wreck itself and is to blame for numerous local abductions. 
This is an adventure in the ongoing Invasion's Edge metaplot.
---
Game Host: Clem
Session duration: 3 hours
Age rating: Teen (13+)

This Starfinder session is hosted by the Pathfinder Society Emerald City Lodge. To sign up for this game, see the RPG signup desk in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

events.title: SCANDAL Concert
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor]

events.title: Just dance off!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Show off your dance skills at our Just Dance Tournament! This panel is first come first reserve, signup when you walk in the doors! (Please show up 15 minutes before the panel starts to secure one of our 16 competing spots!) This is a tournament based competition with a mystery prize for our winner! Come join the fun and compete or feel free to boogie in the background!!

events.title: Gundam: Building and Beyond
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Enter the world of cold steel and glossy plastic: An educational panel to explore the Gundam experience; tracing the franchise's evolution from its gritty wartime anime to the advanced engineering of modern Gunpla building.

events.title: Drag Race Doors Open
events.panelDescription: [Summit Stage]

events.title: HoloLive TCG - Learn to Play
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Do you like VTubers? Do you like Trading Card Games? Have I got news for you. These two things are together at last and you, yes YOU can come and learn to play this brand new TCG with all your favorite HoloLive personalities. Just come over to the TCG Room and we'll have someone waiting to teach you! All participants will receive a ticket for the grand giveaway on Sunday as well!

events.title: HoloLive TCG - Learn to Play
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Presented by MTGPlatinum.com!

Come and enjoy a completely free, curated draft experience reaching through MTG history to provide you with an unpredictable experience you won’t find anywhere else

All Curated Chaos drafts are three rounds of best-of-one games. All participants will also receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway!

Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: Uma Musume: Pretty Derby Tournament 1
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Horse girls race for glory! Place your bets with play money and win prize tickets based on the race results. Will your uma musume come in first? Win prizes!

events.title: Dragon Ball FighterZ Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Arc Sys' love letter to Dragon Ball! 3v3 tag battles, movie-quality supers, and the most hype combos in gaming. Win prizes!

events.title: Badge Ribbon Bingo: Anime Edition
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Come test your luck at Badge Ribbon Bingo! The same old game with an appropriate twist for all you con-goers. Unique and fun badge ribbons will be awarded as prizes at the end of every round, come for the whole time or just for part, being fashionably late is OK. So, feel free to jump in at the start of any round!

events.title: Monsterfreak or Monsterfake
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] How good is your SPICY monster literature knowledge? Put it to the test! Contestants chosen from the audience will compete to identify which of these monstrous erotica descriptions and titles are REAL stories and which ones we just made up.

events.title: Analog Edited AMVs (The Days of the Good Old VCR)
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] AMVs date back to the 80s and 90s way before nonlinear digital editing we are so used to. You'll be amazed at just how good and well-edited some of these videos can be.

events.title: D&D 5e: Roll For Sandwich!
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] "Your party of 6th level adventurers competes as a team in a grand competition to make the ultimate magical sandwich! But which 'wich will reign supreme? And how will the heroes respond when forced to face down deadly ingredients? 
---
Game Host: Juli
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: Everyone! (players age 6 and up)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

events.title: Daggerheart: Rising Through the Fell Graves
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] "Finally, on this rainy, dreary night, you and your party have almost caught up to Dr. Sincipital, an infamous and prolific necromancer. The only thing standing in your way is a labyrinth of a graveyard and the feeling that something is tethered to your spirit. Fight, claw, and blast your way through undead to reach the man you're hunting with the Daggerheart system! 
---
Game Host: Eden
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: Teen (13+)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

events.title: Exalted Essence: Ghostbusters
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] "A remote village has lost contact with the regular ghost trading caravans, and have called a grip group of investigator exorcists to investigate.

Do you want to speak to and bring peace to the dead? Do you want to ensure all ghosts can thrive in their unlife? Are you seeking to help mortals against the supernatural threats of the cold North? Come play divine weapons defending and investigating in the cold, remote North.

CW ghosts, death and despair ( with the power to fight and fix them), undead, grave desecration.

No experience with Exalted, Exalted Essence, or Storytelling System games needed, all materials provided at the table.

---
Game Host: Jeremy Gwinner
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: Teen (13+)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

events.title: Fallout Roleplaying Game: The Needle of the Emerald City
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] "Discover the world of Fallout from the pacific northwest. See how the world has changed and stayed the same. Find out why the city is called the emerald city, what is the needle and deal with different raiders.
---
Game Host: Dave
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: Teen (13+)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

events.title: Monster of the Week : The Curse of Whispering Pines
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] "Love dark modern fantasy? Love wacky punk antics? Then you'll love Monster of the Week! Each party memeber picks one role to form their team of radical monster hunters!

""The small town of Whispering Pines, WV was once a picturesque site along winding state roads where city folks would drive up to take photos of the fall colors as the dense forest trees turned in the autumn. In recent years, however, strange disappearances have left the otherwise-peaceful town worried that someone dangerous is on the loose."" 
---
Game Host: Silver Pendragon
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: 18+ I like to get a tad edgy :3

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

events.title: Ryuutama: Let’s Get Cooking – A Delicious In Dungeon Inspired Adventure
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] "Calling all dungeon delvers with an appetite for adventure! You and your party are tasked with eating your way through the dungeon one monster at a time. Cook up your kills and see how it effects your skills. Will you create a stat-boosting feast, or flop with status-effecting slop? This snack-sized session utilizes a slightly modified version of the Japanese TTRPG system Ryuutama. Bring your imagination and let's get cooking!
---
Game Host: Camille
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: Everyone! (players age 6 and up)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

events.title: Alexandria RPG Library Presents: Classic, Modern & Indie RPGs
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Visit the Alexandria RPG Library and explore over a thousand RPG rulebooks, modules, and player aids from countless game systems. From classic D&D to indie darlings, from cyberpunk noir to magical pirates. We bring all the dice, maps, books, and supplies for you to play in or run a game.

Browse our books, roll up a character, or grab a ticket to join our events. Tickets for each day’s games are available in-person at the RPG Library (Arch Tower, Tahoma 4) at 10AM.

The Alexandria RPG Library is a 501(c)(3) non-profit based in Tacoma, Wash.

events.title: Board Game Library - Presented by Dragonflight Game Con
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Since 1980, Dragonflight Game Con has been introducing board game enthusiasts to a wide variety of games through their convention's extensive lending library of games. Now, you can experience that library here at Sakura-Con! Visit the Dragonflight Game Library in the Board and RPG Gaming Room, located on the Tahoma level of the Gaming Annex, to browse the collection of available games, check out a game, and play in the room's free-play area.

Dragonflight Game Con is a nonprofit, volunteer-run gaming convention that takes place every August in Bellevue, WA. Visit their website at https://dfgamecon.org/ to learn more.

events.title: Thirty Years of Pokemon Trivia
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Pokémon turned thirty in 2026! To celebrate the anniversary, come join other like-minded fans as we share thirty of the most obscure and interesting pieces of Pokémon trivia from across the franchise's history. Even the most diehard fan will learn something as we explore the history of the games, the anime, the trading card game, and even the merchandise!

events.title: Oriana Peron - Drag Race
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor]

events.title: Bring Back "Bad" Cosplay! How the Cosplay Community has Changed.
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Cosplaying is a great way to express your creative side, but with the rise of social media, the community has seen some changes. Many older cosplayers will tell you that over the years, cosplaying has started to turn more into a competition rather than a fun hobby. While this can be a great thing, it can also deter people from entering the community. So how do we keep the cosplay world a welcoming place? Bring back “bad” cosplaying! Join cosplayers DuelGirlLizzy and NezzerCosplay along with photographer Candra Designs to discuss the cosplaying world. Here we will talk about the struggles of entering the hobby, how it is ok and normal to not be a “perfect” cosplayer right out the gate, and how we have grown from our own trials and errors. This is a space to learn and find a community, we hope to see you there!

events.title: Emporio Ivankov's One Piece Game Show
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Hear ye, hear ye all citizens of Kamabakka kingdom! Here on Momoiro Island we have planned an exciting event for fans of One Piece. Emporio Ivankov, your queen, has summed you to show off your knowledge of the One Piece universe and have an opportunity to snag fantastic prizes. There will be discussions, debates and most important of all a chance to grace your queen with your presence. Don't be shy, can't wait to see you there.

events.title: Aliens? On MY Stage?
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Welcome to the Alien Stage 50th Season Celebration! Come play games and ask questions with your favorite idols: Luka, Ivan, Mizi, Till, and Sua! A certain rebel leader might also come and crash the party…

events.title: Your Waifu/Husbando is Trash (Spicy Round)
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] We are pleased to present ""Your Waifu/Husbando is Trash"" for an older audience. Come for the same entertainment, laughs and prizes as the SC-13 panel...but spicier!

events.title: Frankensteining Patterns for Cosplay
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Creating cosplays can be a challenge, from patterning to sewing & more. It can be even more of a challenge to know where to start. Join Hylian Cream, a Master Level Cosplayer, Sewing educator & Janome Maker, in learning how to Frankenstein commercial sewing patterns into the perfect fit for your next cosplay build! This panel will include interactive elements and go over important, beginner friendly details to help you get started.

events.title: Tumblr Sexy Man - Smash or Pass
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Come to an interactive panel where you, yes YOU, get to decide whether an iconic Tumblr sexyman is a “smash” or a “pass,” and defend that choice to your fellow attendees.

events.title: Fight For Your Right To Fanservice
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] The world is becoming increasingly hostile to NSFW content, with active censorship efforts on the rise. However, could anime fanservice stand as one of the last bastions of resistance? Join an author and former adult industry professional for a Q&A about the actions we can take as fans and creators to keep our spice free from censorship and 'on main'.

events.title: Real Toxic Yuri: Not Clickbait
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Is your "citrusy" yuri and cheating yuri not toxic enough for you? Do you want to discover a yuri equivalent to DMMD or Slow Damage? Then join us as we dive into the deep dark depths of truly "Toxic Yuri."

events.title: Most Loved in Deepspace — A Love and Deepspace Game Show (18+)
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Calling all Deepspace Hunters! Come and join a fun and interactive fan panel that will feature quiz and poll-based questions with real-time answering from the audience. This Trivia Trial will cover a variety of serious, silly and spicy topics to test your knowledge—and love—of the otome game, along with some special guests who might have a thing or two to say about these questions. It will be a celebration of our most loved LADS boys with fellow fans and a chance to win some prizes.

events.title: Free Build Session
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] There will be a limited number of FREE kits available at each Free Build Session. These kits are first come, first serve. We highly recommend queuing in advance of each session. Registration will be required at the door for you to enter and work on your kit at one of our stations. Tools and assistance will be available along with both beginner and more advanced kits. You are also welcome to bring a kit of your own to any build session and use our tools or get assistance from one of our room staff members. All free build stations will need to be cleared at the end of the session to prepare for the next session.

events.title: Rhythm Gaming Freeplay
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Get your groove in with up to three other players in Just Dance, mimic silhouettes to iconic pop hits! Featuring other rhythm surprises as well!

events.title: Let's make a Vocaloid song together!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Do you like vocaloid/vocalsynths music and want to learn how to make them? We will go through some basic vocaloid terminology. Then let's make a vocaloid song together! Will it be a hit, or will it flop? No matter, let's have fun!

events.title: Persona 30th Anniversary Fan Panel
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] The Persona series started 30 years ago with Revelations: Persona back on the original PlayStation and now has become one of the biggest series coming out of Japan. This panel will be a fun look back over the past three decades with a room full of fellow fans. This will cover video games, anime, manga, music, and much much more. As well offering plenty of trivia questions with lots of prizes to giveaway.

events.title: Riftbound - Learn to Play
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Riftbound! A TCG based off of the world of League of Legends, but this time in physical card form! A brand new game from UVS Games & Riot Games, Riftbound provides League of Legends gameplay without the searing rage of going 0/8/3 on Summoner's Rift. Unfortunately when your opponent defeats you however, you will not be able to brush it off as 'support diff'. On the other hand, if you win you experience the joy that can only be obtained from getting 22 kills as Garen while the enemy top laner prays for the surrender vote to succeed.

All participants will receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

Disclaimer: Riftbound is very new, extremely popular, and impossible to get product for, so unfortunately we will not have anything extra to send you home with, sorry!

events.title: Flesh and Blood - Free Draft Night Party!
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Swing big for a knockout as cheers and boos amp up the volume in this Super Slam booster draft! Build a deck on the fly as a face (Revered) or heel (Reviled) to play in a limited environment that will 100% surprise you with its technical depth and intricacies. Brownie points if you watched that one SuperEyePatch Wolf video that uses anime to explain pro wrestling! Also we respect Brody King in this house.  All participants also receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

BONUS: If you see a bald guy in a power-chair (Or just ask for Stein) and tell him your favorite wrestler, he'll give you an extra promo card! 

Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: Gundam Wing: Endless Duel Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Round 2 of Gundam Animayhem! The SNES Gundam fighter that goes incredibly hard. Deathscythe, Wing Zero, and more in fast-paced mecha combat. Win prizes!

events.title: Umamusume Horse-Story - Legends on the Track
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Whether you're just making your debut in the Uma world or if you're already a top trainer, saddle up for a trip through Umamusume history! In this panel, you'll learn the real life stories of Japan's most iconic racehorses. Behind every Umamusume is a horse racing legend - together, we'll race through the triumphs and heartbreaks of their careers, and learn how they shaped the personalities of our favorite trainees. Every race tells a story - and we can't wait to share them!

events.title: SCANDAL Post-Concert autograph
events.panelDescription: [Autographs]

events.title: Delta Green: Welcome to Delta Green
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] "As a member of Delta Green your job is to investigate where normal ends. Unexplained deaths, disappearances, secrets and legends, that kind of stuff. It’s your first mission, a former agent has died. They say it’s natural causes, you just need to make sure…
---
Game Host: Matt
Session duration: 2 hours
Age rating: Teen (13+)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

events.title: Character Court!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] "Do you love courtoom dramas? Do you have a favorite character that you have always wanted to defend in court? Do you have a desire to play jury duty for some reason? If "Yes", come join the masterminds behind "Himbology 101" as they put some of your favorite characters on trial and you help them decide whether or not these characters deserve to be punished in the court of fictional law!"

events.title: AMVs From the Vault
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Is there an AMV you once saw years ago and have been longing to watch again? You just may find it here! We’ll be showing some obscure and hard-to-find AMVs from our extensive 20-year-old vault. Requests are encouraged!

events.title: WatchJojo Presents: AMV Trailers Good Enough for the Big Screen (SC-13)
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] WatchJojo returns! This year's list is our top picks of fan made parody or original trailers that are good enough for Hollywood.

events.title: Can I Show You My Fav? - Oshikatsu Yap Session
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] From itabags, itasha, nuikatsu, character parties, cupsleeve events and more - we are here to show you all the tips and tricks we know on how to have a collection that makes other jealous and help you get your collection out of boxes that never see the light of day. Sharing our love of fandom and get your own creative juices flowing. We would love to see your projects as well and if you would like to share them with audience. All levels of energy and interest welcome.

events.title: Into the Mochiverse: The Creation of Vanitas no Carte, Pandora Hearts, and More
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Jun Mochizuki, also known as Mochijun, is the manga-ka of Pandora Hearts, Vanitas no Carte, and the lesser known Crimson Shell. But where did it all start? And where has it come since the beginning? This panel will be a deep dive into the timeline of Mochijun's work since before her debut until current time. We will be talking about the franchises as a whole including manga, anime, and even drama CDs. Good for new fans and old fans alike!

events.title: Cosplay Chess All Game Dress Rehearsal
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Mandatory in person dress rehearsal for both Cosplay Chess games. All stage ninjas, pieces, and kings required.

events.title: Two Rooms and a Boom
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Social deception game of hidden roles and deduction, players are divided into 2 different rooms. Find your teammates, establish trust, and exchange hostages before time runs out and the bomb explodes!

events.title: Two Rooms and a Boom
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Social deception game of hidden roles and deduction, players are divided into 2 different rooms. Find your teammates, establish trust, and exchange hostages before time runs out and the bomb explodes!

events.title: Hot Anime Men in Your Area
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Do you like a good daddy? Lets talk about it. We're back and better than ever. Come talk with us as we define what makes a good daddy, and what differentiates them from other male archetypes. Join us as we pick at your favorite characters and decide if they are a daddy, a baby girl, a male wife or maybe something more.

events.title: FanDUMBS: A Fair & Balanced Analysis
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] We all can agree that fandom is cursed. All fandom. Any fandom. Yes, even your fandom. But why is that? What makes fandom the worst possible thing that a person can be invested in besides NFTs? Learn more as your completely normal and not-at-all-cringey hosts guide you through the history of bad fandom, regrets, and MAYBE how we can prevent this from happening to future fandoms.

events.title: Anisong Trivia
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Are you an anime music fan? Test your knowledge of anime songs against others in this competitive game show where YOU choose the songs! No matter your experience with anime music, there are songs for everyone in this panel! Competitors will be seeded in a live qualifier and placed will be placed into rounds where competitors pick stylized categories similar to Jeopardy. The best players will be placed into a grand final to determine the champion!

events.title: The Intergalactic Samurai: Star Wars and Japan
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] This panel will explore the vast influence Japanese culture and media has had on the creation and evolution of the Star Wars franchise.

events.title: Grand Archive – Learn to Play
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Welcome to the Archive, Champion – do you have what it takes to forestall an apocalypse?

Come find out and learn Grand Archive, a growing new TCG fusing anime aesthetics with the best of western game design! Along with your demo kit, all participants will receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway!

All material graciously provided by Grand Archive’s developer Weebs of the Shore. Thank you for your continued support, WotS!

events.title: BlazBlue: Cross Tag Battle Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] The ultimate anime crossover! Blazblue, Persona, RWBY, and Under Night characters team up. Resonance Blaze your way to victory! Win prizes!

events.title: BlazBlue: Cross Tag Battle Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Round 3 of Gundam Animayhem! Which Gundam fighting game will it be? Show up and find out! Your mecha knowledge will be tested. Win prizes!

events.title: So Wanna Cosplay an AU!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Always wanted to cosplay from an AU but not sure where to start? Not sure what qualifies as an AU? Need some inspiration for your next AU? Come and chat about developing character distinctions for AU cosplays & crossover cosplays!

events.title: Cinderella Must Die: The Villainess Isekai Power Fantasy
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Every heroine needs a villainess – who else will be there to drop cutting comments, spill wine on ber dress, and foam at the mouth as she rises through the ranks of society? A good villainess is a deeply compelling character; the overwhelming success of villainess manga stands as proof of that. But when the duke’s daughter takes the role of female lead, what does that say about the commoners left behind? Together, let’s examine the implicit idea often buried in this power fantasy – shouldn’t Cinderella have known her place?

events.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: The Game Show
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] How much do you know about SEGA's speedy blue hedgehog? You know the one; the Blue Devil, Blue Justice, Blue Blur. Come on by and test your knowledge; maybe it'll win you a prize or two!

events.title: Yaoi Bedtime Stories
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Once upon a time there was a boy who was in love with another boy... Join us for some delicious, cute, and silly yaoi stories read aloud!

events.title: Exploring Motherhood in Arcane
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] What if Arcane didn’t stop at the question: “is there anything so undoing as a daughter?” We’re asking: is there anything so undoing as a mother? From unpacking how their roles shape the narrative, to defining what makes someone (or something) a mother, join us in our hexploration of maternal themes in Arcane. Don’t forget to stick around for some freebies after the panel!

events.title: D&D 5e: To Be The Very Best
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] "Festival bells cut loud through the air! Adventurers are gathering to celebrate the Wild Monster Capture Festival. Tame wild monsters, team up with them in honorable combat, and you could win not only gold, but fame and renown!
---
Game Host: Ryan Zimmerman
Session duration: 2 hours
Age rating: Everyone! (players age 6 and up)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

events.title: Cultural Cross Polination
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] What's the most obscure reference you've ever seen in a cartoon, or anime, or a TV show? Remember when South Park had a full episode about Pokemon? Or when FLCL had a few seconds done in South Park's style? That's what this panel is all about. References, homages, parodies, back and forth, east to west, west to east. It goes back further than you'd think, and in many cases recently, it comes full circle where homages are being referenced, and made into whole new references!

events.title: Digimon Card Game – Learn to Play
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Di-Di-Digimon! Digital Monsters, The Card Game! Come help to save the digital world and learn to play this rich card game that has captivated audiences since 2020! Change yourself into a digital champion and save the digital world. And after you're done digivolving, you'll receive a pack on us to start your journey and a ticket for the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

events.title: German Sparkle Panel
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Coming back for a 2nd year, German sparkle panel! This time join the Axis and the Allies in a late night full of games and improv. now this isn't any ordinary panel this is a 100% Certified GERMAN SPARKLE PARTY which means there will be GAMES, LAUGHS, and maybe a few PRIZES. we will have some questionable 2016 tumblr humor.... and honestly by the end of the night you might as well right it off as another fever dream

events.title: Go Sports!
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Racing, Baseball, Football, Futbol...whatever your sport of choice, this block has something for you!

events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Play different variants of the game of Shogi

events.title: Late Night Go Variants
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Play different variants of the game of Go

events.title: Magical Henshin Matsuri - The Friday Sakura-Con Dance
events.panelDescription:
[Sakura-Con Presents] Get ready to reveal your final form and flex your power levels on the dancefloor at this year's official dances - Magical Henshin Matsuri!
With special DJ guests:
Ian K, JimniCricket, KandiCore, Remnant, R O C K Y, and Synthion!

Free to attend for all convention attendees!

events.title: Social Deception: After Hours
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Social Deception will keep running as long as we have volunteers & players! Won't stop (lying), can't stop (deceiving).

events.title: Social Deception: After Hours
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Social Deception will keep running as long as we have volunteers & players! Won't stop (lying), can't stop (deceiving).

events.title: One Piece TCG - Free Starter Deck Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: Salty Bet
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Two random fighting game characters enter. Only one leaves. Place your bets and watch the chaos unfold! You never know what will happen when Waluigi fights Goku's third cousin!

events.title: Zapp's Loveline Doors Open
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel]

events.title: Zapp's Spaceship of Love: Loveline!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Have you been catfished by an AI Chatbot? Do you have Love in Deep Space installed, or worse yet, tell people you do? Have you gone to a comedy relationship advice panel and taken what they said seriously? If you answered yes to any of these questions; then that's really embarrassing. Thankfully, we're here for you on a purely plutonic level! No question is too stupid, too lewd, too real or too fake, so bring us your hardest hitting and most debilitating relationship questions, and we will answer them for you, satisfaction guaranteed and sometimes in song, or your money back!

events.title: FFXIV Trivia Show
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Think you know about the world of Final Fantasy 14? Come test your knowledge in this trivia panel! Back for a third year!

events.title: A Retrospective on the NaruSaku NaruHina Wars
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] In years past we suffered in the great ship wars. Before Naruto finished and none of us could agree on who would end up with Naruto or Sasuke we turned on each other. "Sakura's useless!" "Hinata's creepy!" We cried... But in the end we must truly ask ourselves as we look back, "Why can't they both be hot?" Come with me on this journey, a retrospective on the ship war.

events.title: On A Path to Nowhere: Why You Should Play This Sapphic Gacha
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Do you wish your gacha games were just a little /more/ gay for the girlies? Do you like it when your games tackle topics of mental health and political commentary in a mature and nuanced way? Join us for a detailed discussion into one of the few games that has cornered the Asian lesbian nerd market with their captivating designs, heartwarming (or wrenching!) stories, and latent sexual tension!

events.title: Tetsuman Orientation
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Matchmaking and table assignment for the Super Secret Tetsuman Tournament.

events.title: Disney MEP III: When You Wish Upon an AMV
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Don your mouse ears and grab a churro for some of the best Disney AMV segments this side of Anaheim.

events.title: Super Secret Tetsuman Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] The after-hours mahjong tournament returns again! Stay up late alongside the pleasing sound of tiles and point sticks as you fight for your right to riichi.

events.title: Cosplay Chess After Dark - Mankind Vs. Monsters
events.panelDescription:
[Sakura-Con Presents] What happens when mankind and monster collide on a chessboard? What happens when they've given few rules, Kings with questionable motives, loads of innuendo, and dangerous props? 

You get this year's Cosplay Chess After Dark! Check out the dark, twisted, and salacious fights piloted by our Kings' unhinged desires.

events.title: Return to Jabberwock Island: An SDR2 panel
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] "We're back on this stupid island!?" Interact with the characters of the hit game "Super Danganronpa 2" as they explore the wonders of hope, do team building exercises, battle romantic rivals, collect hope fragments and much more! Test your danganronpa knowledge in trivia and participate with the cast to win super cool island souvenirs (prizes).

events.title: IMP: A Helluva Boss Sing-Along
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] If you wanna sing-along and you don't wanna wait too long, Call the Immediate Musical Professionals! From Mastermind to Loo Loo Land, your day won't be too bland With the Immediate Musical Professionals! We do our job so well because we come straight up from Hell. We'll sing Cotton Candy and All 2 U, we'll even throw in Chaz Time too. We're the Immediate!! Musical!! Professionals!! Come sing, it's free!

events.title: SAKURA-MIKU EXPO: A Fanmade Vocaloid Concert
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Can’t make it to MIKU EXPO 2026 coming to Seattle this April? Don’t worry! This fan-made concert spectacular is here to cure your FOMO! Get your glowsticks ready, because "SAKURA-MIKU EXPO" is here to bring Japan's favorite virtual idol to the con with a lovingly crafted performance of her most iconic songs. Featuring a setlist of Miku’s biggest songs, this show recreates the energy and spectacle of a real Vocaloid live concert, made by the fans, FOR the fans! Glowsticks encouraged! Note: This is a completely fan-produced, non-commercial event. Hatsune Miku is the property of Crypton Future Media. This concert is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by Crypton Future Media or any official Miku Expo organizers. All content presented is used under fair use principles and is intended solely as a fan tribute, designed to give attendees a special Miku experience of their own. WARNING: THIS SHOW WILL CONTAIN LOUD MUSIC, BUT MAY CONTAIN FLASHING LIGHTS OR IMAGES THAT MAY NOT BE SUITABLE FOR ATTENDEES WITH PHOTOSENSITIVE EPILEPSY - DISCRETION ADVISED

events.title: AMV Time Capsule: 2006
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Jump in the time machine with us and travel to a time when phones were dumb, candy mountain was magical and media wasn't yet social. Experience the best AMVs of 2006.

events.title: Overnight TCG Freeplay - Friday Night
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Did you just get out of the Rave, or a late-night panel, perhaps? Are you looking to still have some fun at the Con overnight? Well, if you brought your own cards, we've got space! The TCG Room may close its outer doors at midnight, but we have a number of free-play tables available for BYO style play. Want to jam out some 2 AM Commander? We got you.

This area is not staffed between the hours of Midnight and 9 AM. All tables are available for use, but we ask that you please clean up after yourselves and behave responsibly in the game space. Failure to comply with this is a violation of intergalactic law. Thank you, and see you bright and early for more scheduled content!

events.title: Made in Abyss Episodes 1 - 4
events.panelDescription:
[Sakura-Con Presents] ANIME SHOWING (Dubbed)

Young cave raider Riko dreams of finding her missing mother in the mysterious, monster-filled Abyss. After discovering Reg, a powerful robot boy with no memory of his past, the two set out together into the Abyss’s depths.

events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] AMVs to make you laugh, cry, cheer and just plain enjoy.

events.title: Top 10 Sexiest FFXIV Characters
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] We asked, you answered. Over 200 responses from our survey. And tonight, we will go over who you all think are the Top 10 sexiest FFXIV characters! Back for our second year!

We highly recommend queuing in advance of each session. Registration will be required at the door for you to enter and work on your kit at one of our stations. Tools and assistance will be available along with both beginner and more advanced kits.
